name: New Jello Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix water, lemon jello, and eggs. Beat for one minute on medium speed.
2. Add the cake mix; beat an additional two minutes.
3. Stir in the Crisco oil until well blended.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 9 x 13-inch cake pan.
5. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 to 45 minutes, or until set.
6. Allow the cake to cool completely before making holes with a fork.
7. In a small bowl, mix lemon juice and powdered sugar to form a glaze.
8. Drizzle the glaze over the cooled cake, filling the holes.
